assertions.title: Dealer finance host ownership

steps.action: Inspect openapi.json for surviving dealer finance paths
steps.expected: Only /api/v1/dealer-portal/** dealer finance paths remain, with POST only on /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests
steps.observed: openapi.json published GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/{dashboard,ledger,invoices,aging,orders,invoices/{invoiceId}/pdf} and POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests; all explicit retired duplicate finance paths were absent.

steps.action: Inspect docs/endpoint-inventory.md and erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv
steps.expected: Both inventories should publish the same surviving dealer finance host and omit retired duplicates
steps.observed: docs/endpoint-inventory.md listed the canonical dealer-portal routes including POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests, but erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omitted that POST route while still omitting all retired duplicate finance paths.

steps.action: Probe retired duplicate dealer finance routes with formerly authorized actors
steps.expected: Legacy duplicate routes should be unmapped/not-found
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/dealers/2/{ledger,invoices,aging,credit-utilization} as admin/sales, GET /api/v1/invoices/dealers/2 as admin, GET /api/v1/accounting/{aging,dealers statements} aliases as accounting, and GET /api/v1/reports/{aging,dso} dealer aliases as accounting all returned 404 application/problem+json with No static resource details.

evidence.network: openapi contract parse; docs/endpoint-inventory.md contained canonical dealer-portal routes; erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omitted POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests; retired aliases returned 404.

assertions.issues: Contract/doc drift: erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv does not publish POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests even though openapi.json and docs/endpoint-inventory.md do.

assertions.title: Dealer finance auth and tenant binding fail closed

steps.action: Login as validation.dealer@example.com on MOCK and GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/dashboard
steps.expected: Dealer-scoped finance endpoint succeeds for mapped dealer
steps.observed: POST /api/v1/auth/login returned 200; GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/dashboard returned 200 with dealerId=2, dealerName=Validation Dealer, creditLimit=500000.0, availableCredit=500000.0.

steps.action: Probe dealer-portal finance as non-dealer callers
steps.expected: Non-dealer callers are rejected
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/dashboard returned 403 for validation.admin@example.com and 403 for validation.accounting@example.com with message Access denied.

steps.action: Probe company mismatch using dealer token with wrong company header
steps.expected: Company mismatch fails closed
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/dashboard with dealer token and X-Company-Code: RIVAL returned 403 with reason=COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISMATCH and detail=Company header does not match authenticated company context.

steps.action: Run targeted finance security/integration suite
steps.expected: Security coverage stays green
steps.observed: Maven suite completed with Tests run: 42, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 (BUILD SUCCESS).

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/auth/login -> 200; GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/dashboard (dealer) -> 200; same route as admin/accounting -> 403; same route with mismatched company header -> 403.

assertions.title: Dealer finance data is self-scoped

steps.action: Compare dealer and rival dealer self-service finance reads
steps.expected: Each dealer sees only its own dealer-scoped data
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/{dashboard,ledger,invoices} on MOCK returned dealerId=2 / Validation Dealer; the same routes on RIVAL returned dealerId=3 / Rival Validation Dealer. Both invoice lists were empty and no foreign dealer IDs appeared in either response.

steps.action: Probe invoice PDF isolation with a real foreign invoice id
steps.expected: Cross-dealer invoice PDF lookup returns 404
steps.observed: Blocked in live runtime because both dealer invoice lists were empty and read-only SQL check of the invoices table returned 0 rows, so no real foreign invoice ID existed to probe. A fallback GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices/999999999/pdf still returned 404 Invoice not found, and the targeted Maven suite passed the dedicated cross-dealer PDF security coverage.

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/dashboard|ledger|invoices on MOCK -> 200 dealerId=2; same routes on RIVAL -> 200 dealerId=3; GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices/999999999/pdf -> 404 Invoice not found; targeted suite BUILD SUCCESS.

assertions.issues: Shared validation runtime had no seeded invoice rows, so the live cross-dealer invoice PDF denial could not be exercised with an actual foreign invoice ID.

assertions.title: Dealer finance remains read-models plus one explicit light action

steps.action: Check dealer-portal verbs in openapi.json
steps.expected: Dealer finance is read-only except POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests
steps.observed: openapi.json exposed only GET methods on /api/v1/dealer-portal/{dashboard,ledger,invoices,aging,orders,invoices/{invoiceId}/pdf} and only POST on /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests.

steps.action: Submit canonical light action
steps.expected: POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests succeeds for dealer
steps.observed: POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests returned 200 with message=Credit limit request submitted, status=PENDING, amountRequested=25000.0, dealerName=Validation Dealer.

steps.action: Probe unapproved dealer-finance write hosts
steps.expected: Other dealer-finance writes are absent or method-blocked
steps.observed: POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/{dashboard,ledger,invoices,aging,orders} each returned 405 Method Not Allowed.

steps.action: Cross-check docs contract proof
steps.expected: Endpoint inventories should publish the same canonical write surface
steps.observed: docs/endpoint-inventory.md included POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests, but erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omitted it.

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests -> 200; POST dealer-portal read endpoints -> 405; openapi shows only canonical POST; endpoint_inventory.tsv missing canonical POST route.

assertions.issues: Docs contract proof is incomplete because erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omits the surviving canonical POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests.

steps.action: Inspect openapi.json and endpoint inventories for portal finance hosts
steps.expected: Canonical internal finance is only /api/v1/portal/finance/{ledger,invoices,aging}
steps.observed: openapi.json, docs/endpoint-inventory.md, and erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv all published GET /api/v1/portal/finance/{ledger,invoices,aging}; the explicit legacy internal finance clones were absent from openapi.json and both inventories.

steps.action: Probe canonical portal finance as admin/accounting
steps.expected: Admin/ops can read canonical internal finance routes
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2, /invoices?dealerId=2, and /aging?dealerId=2 returned 200 as validation.admin@example.com; GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2 returned 200 as validation.accounting@example.com.

steps.action: Probe retired internal finance clones with formerly authorized actors
steps.expected: Legacy portal-facing finance clones are not found
steps.observed: GET legacy dealer/accounting/report finance aliases all returned 404 application/problem+json.

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/portal/finance/{ledger,invoices,aging}?dealerId=2 -> 200 for admin; GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2 -> 200 for accounting; retired clones -> 404.

assertions.title: Internal finance is restricted to admin/ops

steps.action: Probe canonical portal finance as approved admin/ops actors
steps.expected: Admin and accounting callers succeed
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2 returned 200 for validation.admin@example.com and 200 for validation.accounting@example.com.

steps.action: Probe canonical portal finance as denied actors
steps.expected: Dealer, sales, and super-admin callers are forbidden
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2 returned 403 for validation.dealer@example.com, 403 for validation.sales@example.com, and 403 for validation.superadmin@example.com with reason=SUPER_ADMIN_PLATFORM_ONLY.

steps.action: Probe tenant binding and cross-tenant behavior
steps.expected: Company mismatch and cross-tenant lookups fail closed
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2 with admin token and X-Company-Code: RIVAL returned 403 with reason=COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISMATCH; GET /api/v1/portal/finance/aging?dealerId=3 with admin MOCK token returned 404 Dealer not found.

steps.action: Run targeted finance role-matrix/security suite
steps.expected: Role matrix coverage stays green
steps.observed: Maven suite completed with Tests run: 42, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 (BUILD SUCCESS).

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger?dealerId=2 -> 200 for admin/accounting, 403 for dealer/sales/super-admin; header mismatch -> 403; cross-tenant dealer lookup -> 404.

assertions.title: Legacy duplicate finance hosts no longer behave like portal views

steps.action: Probe retired dealer and invoice aliases with strongest formerly authorized actors
steps.expected: Legacy aliases fail as unmapped/not-found
steps.observed: As validation.admin@example.com, GET /api/v1/dealers/2/{ledger,invoices,aging,credit-utilization} and GET /api/v1/invoices/dealers/2 each returned 404 application/problem+json with No static resource details.

steps.action: Probe retired accounting and report aliases with formerly authorized accounting actor
steps.expected: Accounting/report dealer aliases fail as unmapped/not-found
steps.observed: As validation.accounting@example.com, GET /api/v1/accounting/aging/dealers/2, /pdf, /statements/dealers/2, /pdf, /api/v1/reports/aging/dealer/2, /detailed, and /api/v1/reports/dso/dealer/2 each returned 404 application/problem+json.

steps.action: Cross-check contract surfaces
steps.expected: Retired duplicate finance paths are absent from openapi and endpoint inventories
steps.observed: All 12 retired duplicate finance paths were absent from openapi.json, docs/endpoint-inventory.md, and erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv.

evidence.network: All explicit retired finance aliases returned 404 with admin/accounting/sales probes; openapi/docs inventories omitted every retired path.

frictions.description: The shared validation runtime had no seeded invoice rows for either seeded dealer, so live invoice-PDF isolation could not be exercised with a real foreign invoice ID.
frictions.resolution: Used read-only SQL checks plus the targeted Maven suite for supporting proof; retained VAL-DEALER-003 as blocked because the live runtime lacked the prerequisite data.

blockers.description: Contract documentation drift: erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omits POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests even though openapi.json and docs/endpoint-inventory.md publish it.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified the omission via file inspection and cross-checked against openapi.json plus docs/endpoint-inventory.md; no source/doc edits were allowed in this validation task.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 4 passed, 2 failed, 1 blocked. Failures were VAL-DEALER-001 and VAL-DEALER-004 due erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omitting POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests. VAL-DEALER-003 is blocked in live runtime because both seeded dealers had zero invoices, though the targeted Maven suite passed.
